articles.title: Former ’19 Kids and Counting’ star Joseph Duggar is arrested on a child molestation charge
articles.description:
Duggar is charged with lewd and lascivious behavior on a child under 12 years old, according to an arrest affidavit from the Bay County Sheriff's Office in Panama City, Florida.

The post Former ’19 Kids and Counting’ star Joseph Duggar is arrested on a child molestation charge appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Joseph Duggar arrested for lewd behavior towards a child under 12 in Florida.
Arrest made by Bay County Sheriff's Office; details revealed in an affidavit.
Boston residents concerned about safety and implications for child protection policies.

articles.title: The body of an American student who went missing in Barcelona has been found, police in Spain say
articles.description:
James “Jimmy” Gracey's body was found by police divers and positively identified, the press office for Catalonia’s regional police in Barcelona told The Associated Press.

The post The body of an American student who went missing in Barcelona has been found, police in Spain say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: James 'Jimmy' Gracey's body was found by police divers in Barcelona.
The American student was reported missing earlier this month.
His death raises concerns for Boston families with students abroad.

articles.title: ABC cancels ‘Bachelorette’ season with Taylor Frankie Paul, citing 2023 video
articles.description:
“In light of the newly released video just surfaced today, we have made the decision to not move forward with the new season of ‘The Bachelorette’ at this time, and our focus is on supporting the family,” a statement from Disney Entertainment Television said.

The post ABC cancels ‘Bachelorette’ season with Taylor Frankie Paul, citing 2023 video appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: ABC cancels 'Bachelorette' season featuring Taylor Frankie Paul due to a newly surfaced video.
Disney Entertainment Television announced the decision on March 19, 2023.
Boston viewers lose anticipated local entertainment, affecting local ratings and engagement.

articles.title: Would a Massachusetts income tax cut actually help you? Here’s what to know.
articles.description:
A potential ballot question would lower the rate from 5% to 4%, with savings varying widely by income and a major hit to state revenue.

The post Would a Massachusetts income tax cut actually help you? Here’s what to know. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts may reduce income tax rate from 5% to 4% in 2026 ballot.
Savings from the tax cut will vary significantly based on individual income levels.
State revenue could decline sharply, impacting funding for local services and programs.
